titleStmt.title: SII 34.170: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 170. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock outside the west prākāra wall of the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, viruppanna, s/o Ariyana, Śukla, Mīna, sudi 8, Thursday, Punarvasu = A.D. 1390, March 24, Thursday.

This is an exceptional inscription recording sale, by a Brāhmaṇa, of his Veḷḷāḷa slaves (veḷḷāṉ aḍimaigaḷ) most probably to the temple. The sale price of 270 irāsi-paṇam was received by the seller in the presence of one Chilai-cheṭṭiyār of Rājēndirachōḻa-pēṭṭai as witness. It is said that the seller, Vēlippiḷḷai Deyvanayana-bhaṭṭaṉ Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-biramādarāyaṉ of Pālaraikuḍi in Naḍuvil-maṇḍalam, had got the possession of the slaves by gift from his uterine sister Koḍi-vayiraṅgaṭṭiṉa-sāṉi, who was the wife of Tiruvādavūr Poṉmēyndachōḻa-biramārāyar of Uttamachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Chūralūr-kūṟṟam in Rājagembīra-vaḷanāḍu. The slaves included one Chūḍiyār, her four children, and grandchildren too, both male and female members.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī makāmaṇṭalīcuran Arirāyavipāṭaṉ pācaikku tappuva
rāyara kaṇṭan Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyar kumāraṉ viruppaṇa Uṭaiyār Irācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa
cukkulavaruṣattu mīṉanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakkattu Aṭṭamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ
naṭuvil maṇṭalattu pālarai kuṭiya vēlippiḷḷai teyvanayapaṭṭaṉ kulōttuṅkacōḻa piramātarāyaṉēṉ
Irācakempīra vaḷanāṭṭu cūralūṟ kūṟṟattu cōḻakula Uttamacaruppēti maṅkalattu tiruvātavūr poṉmē
ynta cōḻappiramārāyar pārikai Eṉṉuṭaṉ piṟantā koṭi vayiraṅkaṭṭiṉac cāṉi Eṉakku Utaka
pūṟuvamāka paṇṇitanta Eṉṉutāṉa veḷḷāṉaṭimaikaḷil cūṭiyār makkaḷ kuṉṟiyār piṟṟaṭiyār nallāppi
ḷḷaippeṟṟār viṇṭārrumpar Ivarkaḷum Ivarkaḷ piḷḷaikaḷukkup pēranpērttimā Uḷḷavarkaḷaṉai
vaṟkum Urimaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttu Irācēntiracōḻa pēṭṭaiyil cilaiy ceṭṭiyār muṉṉilaiyāka nāṉ kai
kkoṇṭa Irācapa- 2 100 7 10 Ippaṇam Irunūṟṟeḻupatum paṟṟikkoṇṭu taṅkaḷukkurittāmpaṭi tirumalaiyil kal
veṭṭittukkuṭuttēṉ Ituvē cūlamum cuttamumākavum cūṭiyār makkaḷ pēranmār pērtimār Uḷ
rāyaṉēṉ Ippaṭikku kulōttuṅkacōḻa mārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ vaṅkippuṟattu Ātittapaṭṭaṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ citarapaṭṭa
ṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ Ālikkoṉṟai tēvarācapaṭṭaṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ māṭatti cēraṅkarācapaṭṭa
ruḷicceyalpaṭikku kaṇakku ciṅkapperumāḷ muṉṉūṟṟuva piriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ tōṇai ceṭṭiyār
civapāta cēkarappiccaṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ poṟkōyil paṭṭaṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ māṇikka piriyaṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ tiruppirāttuṟai mukaliyāṉēṉ paṉmāyēcura rakṣaiḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
